description:
Create three predefined provisioning kits in Snipe-IT to standardize employee onboarding deployments using the following specifications:

Kit 1: 'Standard Office Kit'
- Asset Models: 1x Dell Latitude 5520, 1x Dell UltraSharp U2722D
- Accessories: 1x Logitech C920 Webcam
- Licenses: 1x Microsoft Office 365 Enterprise
- Consumables: 2x HDMI Cables

Kit 2: 'Developer Workstation Kit'
- Asset Models: 1x HP EliteDesk 800 G6, 2x Dell UltraSharp U2722D
- Accessories: 1x Dell USB-C Dock WD19, 1x Logitech MX Master 3
- Licenses: 1x Microsoft Windows 11 Enterprise, 1x Adobe Creative Cloud

Kit 3: 'Executive Mobile Kit'
- Asset Models: 1x Apple MacBook Pro 16
- Accessories: 1x CalDigit TS4 Thunderbolt, 1x Jabra Evolve2 75
- Licenses: 1x Microsoft Office 365 Enterprise, 1x Zoom Workplace, 1x Slack Business+
- Consumables: 1x USB-C Cables
